case_title: RICHARD TALBERT VS. ADAMS SECURITY CONSULTANTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TALBERT, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS SECURITY CONSULTANTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TALBERT, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMS SECURITY CONSULTANTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $5,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $116.82 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,516.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
